tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose control or possible diabetes. Chloride is slightly elevated and total CO₂ is mildly decreased, which may suggest a mild metabolic acidosis or compensation for a respiratory disorder. Renal function, electrolytes, and glucose are otherwise within normal limits. Clinical correlation is recommended.

text.div: Provider Organization: Centre Médical et Pédagogique Jacques Arnaud

name.value: Centre Médical et Pédagogique Jacques Arnaud

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
